creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 09:16:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/p5-Net-RTP       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Net::RTP module subclasses IO::Socket::Multicast6 to enable you to
  manipulate multicast groups. The multicast additions are optional, so you
  may also send and recieve unicast packets.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-RTP/
  
  PR:             ports/110159
  Submitted by:   Jin-Shan Tseng <tjs at cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1832    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/net/p5-Net-RTP/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-RTP/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-RTP/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-RTP/pkg-plist (new)
